creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-12 20:27:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/yamdi     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  YAMDI stands for Yet Another MetaData Injector and is a metadata injector
  for FLV files. It adds the onMetaData event to your FLV files.
  
  WWW: http://yamdi.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/114432
  Submitted by:   buganini at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.236     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/multimedia/yamdi/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/yamdi/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/multimedia/yamdi/pkg-descr (new)
